about.title: About Me
about.bio: Based in Madrid, Spain. I build digital products with care — from native mobile apps to full-stack web systems.

curiosity.title: Curiosity
curiosity.desc: I stay current with the latest tech developments and love exploring new ideas and tools.

constancy.title: Constancy
constancy.desc: I sustain effort on complex, long-term projects, pushing through challenges with dedication.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.desc: I deliver professional work with commitment, meeting standards with attention to detail.
